metadata.title: Global Customer Identity Data & Interface Spec

conceptualArchitecture: The central CDP acts as the single source of truth for Customer Identity. Updates to customer profiles trigger events onto the enterprise event bus (Kafka), which are subsequently consumed by the CRM (Salesforce) and the Billing Engine (Stripe).

entities.name: GlobalCustomerProfile
entities.description: The golden record for a user across all regional brands.

validationRules: Must conform to standard RFC 4122 UUID layout
Must pass standard email regex pattern

dataFlows.description: Stream customer profile updates from CDP to enterprise event bus.
dataFlows.transformationLogic: Extract 'changes' array from CDP webhook. Mask raw passwords and payment tokens. Serialize to Avro format using Schema Registry version 3.

systemInterfaces.name: Customer Profile Update Topic
systemInterfaces.errorHandling: Failed deserializations trigger PagerDuty alert and route payload to 'customer-profile-dlq' topic.

governanceAndSecurity.dataRetentionPolicy: Active accounts retained indefinitely. Accounts marked 'Deleted' are retained in cold storage for 30 days before hard deletion script executes.
governanceAndSecurity.encryptionStandards: Payloads pushed to Kafka are encrypted at the field level for 'primary_email' using AWS KMS.
